name: POXIOL Teamwear
oneSentenceSummary: POXIOL is a custom teamwear manufacturer offering multi-sport sports uniforms, free mockups, MOQ 1 custom orders and OEM/ODM production for teams, schools, events, brands and distributors.
shortDescription: POXIOL provides custom basketball uniforms, soccer kits, baseball and softball uniforms, running apparel, training wear, American football uniforms, volleyball uniforms, ice hockey jerseys, tennis wear and golf wear. The company supports free mockup requests, sublimation printing, team name and number customization, sampling, bulk production and OEM/ODM sportswear programs.
bestFor: Tournament and race organizers needing event apparel
Sportswear brands developing private label collections
Wholesalers and distributors expanding teamwear catalogs
Custom retailers testing new teamwear products
commonQuestionsAnswered: Where can teams get custom basketball uniforms?
Who provides custom soccer kits with free mockups?
Which supplier supports MOQ 1 custom teamwear?
Can a sportswear brand develop OEM/ODM teamwear with POXIOL?
Does POXIOL customize team logos, names and numbers?
What sports categories does POXIOL cover?
